How does Stratum summarize a policy?: Báwo ni Stratum ṣe ń ṣàkótán ìlànà?
Upload a policy document and Stratum ext: Upload a policy document and Stratum extracts the text, analyzes its clauses, and creates an evidence-linked plain-language summary.
Does Stratum work outside the app?: Ṣé Stratum ń ṣiṣẹ́ lẹ́yìn ìṣàfilọ́lẹ̀?
The current web version handles uploaded: The current web version handles uploaded policies and includes a selection demo. System-wide text selection is planned for a later desktop or browser integration.
What do the colored flags mean?: Kí ni àwọn àmì aláwọ̀ túmọ̀ sí?
Red flags indicate high-risk clauses. Am: Red flags indicate high-risk clauses. Amber flags highlight moderate concerns. Teal flags mark lower-risk or reassuring findings.
Can I compare two policies?: Ṣé mo lè fi ìlànà méjì wé ara wọn?
Yes. Open Policy Library, select two or: Yes. Open Policy Library, select two or more featured policies, and choose Compare.
How do I change the app language?: Báwo ni mo ṣe yí èdè ìṣàfilọ́lẹ̀ padà?
Open Settings and choose App and summary: Open Settings and choose App and summary language. The interface changes immediately, and new or regenerated summaries use the same language.

By using this service, you agree that we: By using this service, you agree that we may collect, store, and share your usage data with third-party advertising partners. This agreement includes a binding arbitration clause, meaning you waive your right to a jury trial or to join a class-action lawsuit. Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing cycle unless canceled at least 48 hours in advance. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time without direct notice.
